creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Tue Jun 25 18:20:39 2013
New Revision: 321755
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/321755

Log:
  - Update to 1.6.0
  
  PR:		ports/179943
  Submitted by:	Jin-Sih Lin <linpct@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/sysutils/py-ranger/Makefile
  head/sysutils/py-ranger/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/py-ranger/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/sysutils/py-ranger/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/py-ranger/Makefile	Tue Jun 25 18:07:07 2013	(r321754)
+++ head/sysutils/py-ranger/Makefile	Tue Jun 25 18:20:39 2013	(r321755)
@@ -1,12 +1,8 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	py-ranger
-# Date created:		14 July 2012
-# Whom:			Jin-Sih Lin <linpct@gmail.com>
-#
+# Created by: Jin-Sih Lin <linpct@gmail.com>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	ranger
-PORTVERSION=	1.5.5
+PORTVERSION=	1.6.0
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils python
 MASTER_SITES=	http://ranger.nongnu.org/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -17,7 +13,7 @@ COMMENT=	Ranger is a file manager with V
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
 
-MAN1=		ranger.1
+MAN1=		ranger.1 rifle.1
 
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|setuptools|distutils.core|; s|share/man/man|man/man|' ${WRKSRC}/${PYSETUP}
